title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows someone getting ready for school. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A young boy is getting ready for school in a hallway at home. He is putting books into his backpack. There is a coat, a pair of shoes and a lunch box beside him.

followUp.question: Talk about the person. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people going camping. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A family is putting up a tent at a campsite. The parents are holding the tent while two children are carrying sleeping bags. There are trees, a car and camping chairs nearby.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
